final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 character expression grid for 赵灵儿 from 仙剑奇侠传.

Style/medium: needs a "3D animation" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Pixar character design heritage, 2010s DreamWorks expressive character rigs, 吉卜力 studio character warmth; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 3×3 grid layout (9 panels), each panel showing 赵灵儿 peeking through a torn hole in white paper, consistent framing across all panels
Subject: must include 赵灵儿 (young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses) with 9 distinct expressions and actions:
  Top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must be consistent torn white paper holes as framing device for all 9 panels
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve 赵灵儿 IP identity from 仙剑奇侠传, all 9 panels visible in 3×3 grid, consistent character base across panels
Avoid:
